subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be happy to schedule a meeting to explore potential collaboration.

The following time windows are available:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those works well, please suggest a preferred time within the window and we can coordinate from there.

I’m not able to share internal contact details or directory information for internal team members, but I’m happy to help coordinate the appropriate next steps through this email thread.

Best regards,
